cost_components_summary: No separate non-commodity residual cost is calibrated. Commodity inputs and carbon costs are priced by normal solver semantics.
input_basis_notes: Allocated from the former transport-other residual calibration; the demand anchor is 1 residual_activity so coefficients equal the allocated 2025 residual quantities.
emissions_boundary_notes: Residual calibration emissions are represented directly on the residual incumbent method. Electricity-related emissions flow through electricity supply.
rollout_limit_notes: Single residual incumbent route; scenario control is by enabling or disabling the role method.
availability_conditions: Available in all milestone years as a coarse calibration placeholder until explicit passenger aviation pathways are authored.
evidence_summary: Derived from the migrated residual transport calibration layer and split out to make passenger aviation visible.
derivation_method: Allocated from the former aggregate transport residual bucket pending explicit aviation activity and technology data.
review_notes: Residual stub for closure and scenario accounting, not an optimisable technology representation.
candidate_expansion_pathway: Split into explicit aviation service pathways when source data support them.
times_or_vedalang_mapping_notes: Can map to a fixed calibration demand process with explicit commodity inputs or direct emissions.
